args.sql: SELECT t1.teigid, t1.lagretberegnetareal FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig AS t1 INNER JOIN flomsoner_92001766ec964ab8b545fef0a00e6d23.flomareal AS t2 ON ST_Intersects(t1.geom, t2.omrade) WHERE t1.kommunenummer = '3001' AND t1.lagretberegnetareal > 5000 AND t2.gjentaksintervall = 200 ORDER BY t1.lagretberegnetareal DESC LIMIT 10
